events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday, known for his iconic Red Special guitar and groundbreaking solos.

angles.name: Guitar God Turns 79
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! From stadium-rocking anthems to his unique Red Special, his influence is undeniable. What’s your favourite Queen guitar moment?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday, continuing his legacy as one of rock's most energetic and influential performers.

angles.name: Rock Icon at 83
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Happy 83rd birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger. Six decades of rock and roll, and he’s still front and centre. What's your top Stones track?

events.title: MTV's 45th Anniversary
events.blurb: On August 1, 1981, MTV launched with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star,' forever changing the music industry.

angles.name: MTV: 45 Years of Influence
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV hit the airwaves with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The irony! It truly revolutionised how we consumed music. What's your favourite iconic music video moment?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' Anniversary
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' in 1994, a defining moment for Britpop and a record-breaker.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the game-changing debut of Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' from 1994. It wasn't just an album; it was a statement. What's your go-to track from this Britpop classic?

events.title: Woodstock Festival's 57th Anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, '3 Days of Peace & Music,' took place from August 15-18, 1969, becoming a cultural touchstone.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music: 57 Years On
angles.copy: 57 years since the iconic Woodstock Festival. A weekend that defined a generation with '3 Days of Peace & Music'. Which artist would you have loved to see perform?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death
events.blurb: Remembering Elvis Presley, who would have been 91, on the anniversary of his passing in 1977, a date that marked the end of an era for music.

angles.name: Tribute to The King
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91. His voice and charisma continue to captivate generations. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's Death
events.blurb: Remembering the influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55, on the anniversary of his tragic death in Las Vegas in 1996.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: On this day, we remember Tupac Shakur, a voice that profoundly shaped a generation and who would have been 55. His music and message live on. What's your most impactful Tupac lyric?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's Death
events.blurb: Remembering guitar icon Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84, on the anniversary of his passing in 1970, leaving behind an unparalleled musical legacy.

angles.name: Honouring Jimi Hendrix
angles.copy: Today, we pay tribute to the incomparable Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84. A true innovator whose guitar work changed music forever. Which Hendrix track showcases his genius best?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' Anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album, featuring its legendary zebra crossing cover, was released in 1969, their final recorded work together.

angles.name: Crossing into History
angles.copy: Remembering The Beatles' 'Abbey Road', released in 1969. That iconic cover and a tracklist that's pure gold. What's the standout song for you?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The distinctive voice and songwriter of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde at 75
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Her unique style and powerful vocals with The Pretenders have left an indelible mark on music. What's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The unmistakable voice of Oasis, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday, continuing his rock'n'roll journey.

angles.name: Our Kid Turns 54
angles.copy: Parklife? Nah, it's Liamlife! Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. The voice, the attitude, the tunes. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' Anniversary
events.blurb: John Lennon's powerful anthem 'Imagine' was re-released as a single in the UK in 1975, spreading its message of peace globally.

angles.name: Imagine: A Message for Today
angles.copy: 51 years since John Lennon's 'Imagine' resonated with the world. Its message of peace and unity feels as vital now as it did then. Which lyric speaks to you most?

events.title: iPod's 25th Anniversary
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod in 2001, revolutionising how we carry and listen to music, celebrating its 25th anniversary.

angles.name: 25 Years of the iPod
angles.copy: Remember your first iPod? Today marks 25 years since Apple launched the device that put '1,000 songs in your pocket'. How did it change your music world?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is James Bond Day, celebrating the enduring legacy of 007 and the premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No,' in 1962.

angles.name: Happy 007 Day!
angles.copy: It's James Bond Day! Celebrating the world's most famous secret agent and those iconic theme tunes. Which Bond theme gets your pulse racing every time?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today, a visionary artist and advocate for peace.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the incredible John Lennon. His music and message of peace continue to inspire. What's your favourite Lennon song?

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian and actor, John Cleese, known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Legend Turns 87
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the utterly brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, his comedic genius is timeless. What's your favourite John Cleese moment?

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' Anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles released their experimental and diverse self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album,' in 1968.

angles.name: The White Album's Enduring Sound
angles.copy: The Beatles' 'White Album' dropped in 1968, a sprawling, eclectic masterpiece. Which track from this iconic double album is a must-listen for you?
